message:
refactor(engine): apply Rust idiom improvements across match arms, iterators, and ownership

Collapse nested if-blocks into guard-based match arms in cut_line_automation
and object_model. Replace manual sequence counters with zip-based iteration in
hostcall_batch_transport and privacy_learning_contract. Remove redundant
into_iter() in persistent_cache_contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
